title: Senior QA Automation Engineer
tagsAndSkills: git,linux,system automation,agile,jira,communication skills,docker,Senior
jobDescription:
We are looking for a highly skilled and experienced Senior QA Automation Engineer to join our team in Hyderabad. The ideal candidate will have 4 to 9 years of experience in software testing, with a strong focus on automation and quality assurance.
Roles and Responsibility
  • Design and implement automated tests for system-level testing of software products.
  • Extend an existing QA automation platform to test all aspects of software products.
  • Test back-end, front-end, and cloud technologies to improve automation and manual test coverage.
  • Learn and test new or complex features on upcoming projects to ensure smooth delivery.
  • Participate in agile development environments and customer-facing discussions, meetings, and project delivery.
  • Troubleshoot software issues to identify root causes.
Job Requirements
  • Passion for product quality and testing.
  • Knowledge and experience in system automation and common tools and libraries.
  • Experience testing back-end, front-end, and cloud technologies.
  • Ability to identify valuable automated tests and those that are better done manually.
  • Strong knowledge of Python programming.
  • Good communication and documentation skills.
  • Knowledge and experience with Linux, Docker, and common system maintenance tools.
  • Knowledge and experience with TCP/IP networking.
  • Experience working in an agile development environment using common tools such as JIRA and Git.
  • Comfortable in a fast-moving environment and able to quickly adapt to changes in priorities.
  • Any knowledge and/or interest in electrical concepts, power grids, renewable, or green energy is a plus.

title: QA - Automation Testing (Senior Engineer / Engineer)
tagsAndSkills: Computer science,Data migration,Manager Quality Assurance,Data management,Performance testing,Selenium,Test cases,Monitoring
jobDescription:
Its fun to work in a company where people truly BELIEVE in what they are doing!

Were committed to bringing passion and customer focus to the business.

About Fractal:

Fractal is one of the most prominent players in the Artificial Intelligence space. Fractals mission is to power every human decision in the enterprise and brings Al, engineering, and design to help the worlds most admire Fortune 500 companies. Fractal has more than 3600 employees across 16 global locations, including the United States, UK, Ukraine, India, Singapore, and Australia. Fractal has consistently been rated as Indias best companies to work for, by The Great Place to Work.

The Quality Assurance Engineer will join our team and support the deployment and monitoring of quality standards. The QA Engineer will work with engineers across teams to develop a Quality Assurance framework for the entire organization and Gen AI platforms. As a QA Engineer you will be a part of the Data Management & Platforms team and will help drive quality throughout the entire data product lifecycle through collaboration with product and development teams, development of test cases and automation scripts, and analysis of the system to consistently deliver quality products to downstream consume.

RESPONSIBILITIES:

1. 5 + yrs of experience in a Data Testing role validating different aspects of data migration, ETL & DW testing practices.

2. Knowledge or working experience in Generative AI (GenAI) technologies is preferred.

2. Extensive knowledge of SQL for testing, analysis.

3. Exposure to testing in data migration. Familiarly with diff test approaches used for migration validation

4. Thorough knowledge of testing and defect management lifecycle.

5. Clear understanding of AWS ecosystem and data-related services such as S3, Glue etc.

6. Hands on experience on Python , Pytest and other common tools used for data testing automation (Automating Data ingestion, Validation, mapping, Data reconciliation, historic/incremental loads etc).

7. Experience in automating parts of data validation (using dataframes, python setup).

8. Excellent coordination and communication skills to collaborate with the engineering, support teams, and business users to define test cases, execute data validations.

9. Contribute to performance testing (e.g., load testing) to validate data handling under stress.

10. Contribute to test automation frameworks where applicable.

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS:

Knowledge or working experience in Generative AI (GenAI) technologies like LLM, RAG are preferred. Experience working with professional software engineering practices and best practices for the full software development life cycle. Experience in Data migration projects and ETL testing. Experience in Selenium Automation testing using Python, Pytest

EDUCATION:

B.E/B.Tech/M.Tech in Computer Science or related technical degree OR Equivalent

If you like wild growth and working with happy, enthusiastic over-achievers, youll enjoy your career with us!

Not the right fitLet us know youre interested in a future opportunity by clicking Introduce Yourself in the top-right corner of the page or create an account to set up email alerts as new job postings become available that meet your interest!

title: Qa Automation Testing Engineer
tagsAndSkills: Karate,Swagger Api,API Testing,Core Java Programming,Postman,Java,Api Gateway,GIT
jobDescription:
Job Title: QA Automation Engineer (Java | Selenium | Playwright | API Testing)
Company: AI Infotech
Location: Chennai (Work from Office)
Employment Type: Full-Time
Experience: 02 Years

About the Role

AI Infotech is hiring a QA Automation Engineer to join our growing Quality Engineering team and work on enterprise applications for an onshore US client. This role is ideal for candidates passionate about automation testing, API validation, and delivering reliable, high-quality software products.

You will work closely with QA Leads, Developers, and Product teams in an Agile environment while contributing to automation framework development and test execution.

Key Responsibilities

  • Develop, maintain, and execute automation test scripts using Java, Selenium, Playwright, and Karate Framework.
  • Perform API testing and validation using Postman and Swagger/OpenAPI.
  • Execute functional, regression, integration, and end-to-end testing.
  • Create reusable automation components and improve existing test frameworks.
  • Identify, document, and track defects through complete resolution.
  • Participate in requirement analysis, sprint planning, estimation, and Agile ceremonies.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure quality throughout the SDLC.
  • Continuously improve test coverage, execution speed, and automation efficiency.

Required Skills

  • Strong understanding of Core Java fundamentals.
  • Hands-on knowledge of Selenium Automation.
  • Exposure to Playwright and/or Karate Framework.
  • Experience in API Testing (Postman, Swagger).
  • Good understanding of Manual Testing concepts and SDLC/STLC.
  • Knowledge of test design techniques and defect lifecycle.
  • Basic understanding of SQL/database validation.
  • Familiarity with Git and CI/CD concepts is an advantage.
  • Exposure to TypeScript is a plus.

Qualification

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science / IT / Engineering or related field.
  • 0–2 years of experience in QA Automation / Software Testing.
  • Freshers with strong automation projects and testing fundamentals can also apply.

Preferred Candidate Profile

Strong problem-solving and debugging skills
Good communication and stakeholder interaction skills
Quick learner with ownership mindset
Ability to work independently and in a collaborative environment
Passion for automation and continuous improvement

Why Join AI Infotech?

  • Opportunity to work with US-based client projects
  • Exposure to modern automation frameworks
  • Learning-oriented and growth-focused environment
  • Hands-on experience with real-time QA processes

title: QA Automation Tester, AI Engineer
tagsAndSkills: and automation scripting,Selenium with Java,QA Automation / Functional Testing,execution,GitHub,test case design,Ci/Cd,JIRA
jobDescription:
Job Description:

Job Requirements*

  • 38 years of experience in QA Automation / Functional Testing 
  • Strong hands-on experience in Selenium with Java
  • Experience in test case design, execution, and automation scripting
  • Knowledge of automation frameworks (data-driven, hybrid, POM)
  • Familiarity with CI/CD tools (Jenkins, GitHub, Docker)
  • Experience in defect tracking and reporting tools (e.g., JIRA)
  • Good understanding of regression testing and QA lifecycle
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills 
  • Ability to work in agile teams and collaborate with stakeholders 
  • Good communication skills

Key Responsibilities*

  • Design and develop test plans, test cases, and automation scripts
  • Execute manual and automated test cases
  • Identify, log, track, and verify defects with proper documentation
  • Perform regression testing to ensure stability after changes
  • Collaborate with developers and product teams for issue resolution
  • Improve automation coverage and efficiency
  • Ensure high product quality and user experience
  • Participate in test planning and sprint activities

Domain

  • Quality Assurance / Automation Testing

Soft Skills

  • Strong communication
  • Team collaboration 
  • Analytical thinking 
  • Attention to detail

Education Requirements

Bachelors or master’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related field preferred

Certifications 

ISTQB, Selenium Certification, Agile / Scrum certification

title: Senior QA Automation Engineer
tagsAndSkills: Unix,Automation,MS SQL,RDBMS,Coding,Postgresql,Agile,JSON

placeholders.label: Kolkata, Mumbai, New Delhi, Hyderabad, Pune, Chennai, Bengaluru

jobDescription:
Responsibilities
  • Analyze and comprehend requirements, create manual and automated tests, and maintain them. Execute regression test suites, analyze the test failures, and report defects.
  • Identify opportunities to automate manual processes as much as possible to make release processes more efficient. Also, integrate all the touch points in the QA process, like integrating automated test results with test specs and generating reports.
  • Work in an agile model. Analyze, troubleshoot and fix failures and issues in "build - test - deploy" CI/CD pipelines
  • Follow best practices in areas like security, performance and cost efficiency when working on developing the workflows
  • Communicate and collaborate with a co-located and distributed team of architects, developers, QA engineers to resolve issues, and provide clear status updates
  • Escalate issues in time and able to follow up for their status
  • Works independently with minimal or no supervision, is proactive and takes ownership of the testing area
  • Ability to think out of the box
Qualifications
  • Minimum of 5-7 years of experience
  • Bachelors degree in computer science or a related field
  • Detailed Knowledge of cloud technologies like AWS, Azure, K8S, dockers, containers etc.
  • Experience with technologies like REST APIs, Web services, NodeJS, Docker.
  • Experience using CI/CD pipeline tools like Jenkins, TeamCity.
  • Experience working on UNIX & MAC systems
  • Experience in using GIT repo, JIRA
  • Experience in Web UI and API automation (coding, scripting, etc.) and proficiency with at least one automation language, tool, or technology like Protractor, Playwright, Python etc
  • Technical expertise in Go, Yaml and Json.
  • Technical expertise in Helm.
  • Knowledge of at least one RDBMS database like Oracle, Postgresql, MS SQL Server, etc
